title: The Metamorphosis
style_notes: Typography as visual material — Kafka's text becomes the texture of a bug. Characters drift, rotate, and infect their neighbors when touched, spreading deformation like a virus. Warm paper background, near-black to rust-red color shift. Dense, literary, narrative-driven. The sketch has a dramatic arc: pristine → corrupted. Perlin noise gives each character its own organic tremor.
mood: unsettling, literary, slow transformation, body horror through typography
palette: warm paper (#f4eee4), deep near-black (#16100a), rust red (#8b3512)
motion: infection spread, mouse-driven deformation, Perlin noise idle sway, accumulated rotation
